overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet reflective streets, elevated highways, and futuristic architecture. The player walks from a wide street through narrow graffiti-covered alleys, up a staircase, and into a large plaza surrounded by skyscrapers with glowing advertisements. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: camera turns left into narrower commercial street
black sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet reflective street beneath elevated highway structures, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the wet road
person in orange jacket standing near the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide wet street beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic city. The camera walks forward past a yellow-paneled industrial building and a modern street lamp, then turns left as a black sedan drives by on the right. The environment is illuminated by neon lights reflecting off the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial alley with liquor store and graffiti

events.description: entering narrow alley with commercial storefronts and neon signage
passing into darker shaded area as the alley narrows

agents.ego_description: walking past the Malted Mucka Liquors storefront and continuing down the narrow passage with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing green umbrella walking ahead
person in bright green shirt walking alongside the umbrella holder

entered.detail: corner storefront with red neon signage reading 'MALTED MUCKA LIQUORS' and graffiti on lower walls
concrete wall covered in colorful tags and spray paint art
tall palm tree trunk visible on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrower commercial alley, passing the neon-lit Malted Mucka Liquors store on the left. The walls are covered in graffiti, and two pedestrians with a glowing green umbrella walk ahead. The space becomes more enclosed as the camera progresses deeper into the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty back alley with dumpsters and utility structures

events.description: entering darker narrow service alley with trash and industrial dumpsters
beginning to ascend long concrete staircase at end of alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow graffiti-covered alley and climbing the concrete stairs at the end

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing against the graffiti wall, one with distinctive red hair
person with red umbrella descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: long flight of concrete stairs leading upward between industrial walls
large green metal dumpsters with trash bags and debris scattered around
large industrial exhaust fans mounted on the dark wall

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a gritty back alley filled with graffiti, trash, and industrial dumpsters. A group of NPCs stands against the wall on the left. The camera approaches and begins ascending a long concrete staircase, passing a person with a red umbrella coming down.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with palm trees and digital advertising

events.description: exiting staircase into large open plaza with palm trees and skyscrapers
camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers against the night sky

agents.ego_description: emerging from the stairs into a large plaza and looking up at the towering buildings and neon-lit architecture

notable_agents.action: person walking across the plaza ahead toward the buildings

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing 'DYNALAR' and product imagery
tall palm trees growing in planters throughout the open plaza
massive dark building with prominent yellow neon vertical lighting strips
concrete seating structures in the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the stairs into a spacious elevated plaza surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers. Palm trees and concrete benches dot the area. The camera pans upward to reveal towering buildings with glowing yellow neon lights against the dark sky, then returns to level to show the plaza extending toward a busy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with pedestrian walkway and vehicle traffic

events.description: camera returns to level and continues walking along the pedestrian path
multiple vehicles drive past on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the pedestrian path next to the street, observing passing traffic and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the wet street with headlights on
NCPD officer standing near the street barrier

entered.detail: wet asphalt street with yellow lane markings and moving vehicle traffic
metal railings with yellow stripes separating sidewalk from street
yellow industrial scaffolding structure on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the edge of the plaza toward a busy street, passing palm trees and approaching traffic barriers. Vehicles drive past on the wet multi-lane road to the right, their lights reflecting on the pavement. An NCPD officer stands near the street as the camera continues along the pedestrian walkway beside the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, rain-slicked industrial street into the towering heights of a neon-lit urban plaza. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving past yellow-paneled buildings and reflecting neon lights on wet asphalt before turning left as a black sedan passes. The camera then transitions into a narrowing commercial alley, passing the glowing signage of a liquor store and pedestrians with green umbrellas, which gradually shifts into a grittier back alley filled with graffiti and industrial dumpsters. As the camera ascends a long concrete staircase past a person with a red umbrella, the enclosed space opens up into a spacious elevated plaza dotted with palm trees and concrete benches. Finally, the view pans upward to reveal skyscrapers with glowing yellow lights before moving along the plaza's edge toward a busy multi-lane road where an NCPD officer stands beside the flowing traffic.
